meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - Cyber Game Changers Women Who Lead, Secure and Inspire - Panel
meta.description: A powerful panel spotlighting women reshaping cybersecurity. Hear real stories, career advice, and how they’re advancing diversity in the field.
